items.title: SoFi Launches SoFiUSD Stablecoin Across Ethereum and Solana
items.whyYouShouldCare: The launch of SoFiUSD on Solana enhances liquidity options and could attract more users to the Solana ecosystem, increasing its competitive edge.

items.title: SoFi rolls out SoFiUSD stablecoin to banking app users
items.whyYouShouldCare: SoFi's stablecoin integration into its banking app may drive user engagement and expand Solana's presence in the mainstream financial sector.

items.title: Solana DEX Orca launches new marketplace for tokenized real-world assets
items.whyYouShouldCare: Orca's new marketplace for tokenized real-world assets could boost Solana's DeFi ecosystem, attracting more projects and users to the platform.
